appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.paletteHint: Slate is the default. The others are curated palettes; each supports light + dark.

ai.title: AI Diagnostics
ai.description: Configure a custom LLM judge provider. The API key is stored encrypted and never returned in plaintext.
ai.keyPlaceholderExisting: sk-*** (leave blank to keep saved key)
ai.savedKeyNotRevealable: Saved keys cannot be revealed. Type a new key to preview it here.

error.keyRequired: API Key is required for first-time setup
error.fillBeforeTest: Fill Base URL and Model first; the first test also requires an API Key

data.title: Data
data.clearTestDataWarning: This clears every page's form fields and test results across Load Test, E2E Smoke, and Request Debug. Your connection library and appearance settings are kept.
data.resetWarning: This deletes every connection, every form value, theme, and locale preference. Are you sure?
